HC2_CD4: Library construction for RNA sequencing was performed with 1 ug of total RNA using Illumina‚Äôs TruSeq Stranded Total RNA LT Sample Prep Kit with Ribo-Zero Globin (Illumina, San Diego, CA, USA). Qualified samples were first proceeded to random fragmentation, with a median length of 150 bp, and converted to double-stranded cDNA. The adapter-ligated fragments were PCR amplified and gel purified. Then, the library was loaded into a flow cell, and cluster generation was executed. Sequencing was done by Illumina Novaseq6000 following the manufacturer‚Äôs protocol. Image analysis, per-cycle base calling, and quality score assignment was performed with Illumina primary analysis software, RTA (Real-Time Analysis).
